## Linked issue

Closes #

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix (no API change)
- [ ] New feature (backwards-compatible)
- [ ] Breaking change (config key removed/renamed, hook schema bump, etc.)
- [ ] Docs only
- [ ] Internal refactor / tests / tooling

## Manual verification

<!-- How did you test this? F5 dev host? Real Claude session? Edge case? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run release:check` passes locally
- [ ] New / changed behaviour has tests (or "no tests, here's why")
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `## [Unreleased]`
- [ ] No new dependencies, or if there are, they're justified in the PR description and on the license allow-list
- [ ] User-facing strings reviewed for clarity
- [ ] No secrets / paths / personal info in commits
